title: Cytosine methylation polymorphisms in cotton using TD-MS-RAPD-PCR
author: Mehmet Karaca
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Methylation such as methylation at the fifth atom of cytosine base usually associated with the changes in gene expression by altering proteins binding to DNA and by changing the nucleosome, a basic unit of DNA packaging in eukaryotes.
steps_raw: Methylation such as methylation at the fifth atom of cytosine base usually associated with the changes in gene expression by altering proteins binding to DNA and by changing the nucleosome, a basic unit of DNA packaging in eukaryotes.
